query: AMPAS AI actors scripts eligibility rules 99th Oscars 2026

mako.raw:
{"query":"AMPAS AI actors scripts eligibility rules 99th Oscars 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1541,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"For the 99th Oscars, new guidelines require that movies have meaningful human involvement to be eligible. Only performances and roles carried out by real people, with proper credit and consent, will qualify, and screenplays must be written by humans, not AI.May 4, 2026"},"results":[{"url":"http://press.oscars.org/news/awards-rules-and-campaign-promotional-regulations-approved-99th-oscarsr","title":"AWARDS RULES AND CAMPAIGN PROMOTIONAL REGULATIONS APPROVED FOR 99TH OSCARS® | Academy Press Office","content":"May 1, 2026 — For Academy Awards consideration, a feature film must have a qualifying theatrical release between January 1, 2026, and December 31, 2026.Read more
Additionally, in the Acting category, only roles credited in the film’s legal billing and demonstrably performed by humans with their consent will be considered eligible.
Qualifying festivals for the 99th Oscars® are the Berlin International Film Festival (Golden Bear for Best Film), Busan International Film Festival (Busan Award - Best Film Award), Cannes Film Festival (Palme d’Or), Sundance Film Festival (World Cinema Grand Jury Prize), Toronto International Film Festival (Platform Award) and Venice International Film Festival (Golden Lion).
In the Original Song category, the rules clarify a song’s eligibility when based on its placement in the end credits.
Wednesday, November 4, 2026: Submission deadline for Music (Original Score)
January 8 – 10, 2027: Casting, Makeup and Hairstyling, Sound and Visual Effects voting events (bake-offs)"},{"url":"https://variety.com/2026/film/awards/oscars-rule-changes-ai-acting-nominations-international-1236734659/","title":"Oscars 2026 Rules: AI Limits, Multiple Acting Nominations Allowed","content":"The last notable acting rule change came at the 17th Academy Awards in 1945, when Barry Fitzgerald became the only performer in Oscar history to receive nominations for both lead and supporting actor for the same role, Father Fitzgibbon in “Going My Way” (1944).
This has been a major source of tension in the industry following the use of Val Kilmer’s likeness in an upcoming film, “As Deep as the Grave.”
In the writing categories, the rules now formally codify that screenplays must be human-authored to qualify.
The organization emphasized that while its rules continue to evolve alongside technology, its commitment to human artistry remains unchanged.
13, 2026, for early short film and documentary entries; Sept."},{"url":"https://www.dw.com/en/new-oscars-rules-exclude-ai-performers-require-scripts-written-by-human/a-77016539","title":"New Oscars rules: No AI actors, human-written scripts only","content":"The governing body of the Academy Awards clarified that acting performances and screenplays must be created by humans, while allowing the use of artificial intelligence tools.
Announcing significant changes for the international feature category, the academy said films can now qualify not only through national submissions but also by winning top awards at major festivals, including Cannes, Berlin, Busan, Venice or Toronto, the Academy said.
Earlier, an actor could not receive multiple nominations in a single category for roles in different films, although this was allowed for other Oscar categories.
The changes will apply to the 99th Academy Awards, scheduled for March 2027."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2026/05/oscar-rules-changes-2026-acting-international-film-1236878201/","title":"Oscar Rules Changes: Seismic Moves In Acting and International Film Categories","content":"The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences has just made Oscar rule and eligibility changes in the acting and International Film categories that have to rank with the most significant in its nearly 100-year history.
AMPAS has jumped into the AI conversation in an official way, now clearly stating that only performances “demonstrably performed by humans” will be eligible in acting categories.
The same goes in writing categories, which have been codified to say only human-authored screenplays are eligible."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"AMPAS AI actors scripts eligibility rules 99th Oscars 2026","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.latimes.com/entertainment-arts/movies/story/2026-05-01/film-academy-sets-new-ai-rules-for-oscars-eligibility","title":"Film academy sets new AI rules for Oscars eligibility - Los Angeles Times","content":"In new rules announced Friday for next year’s 99th Academy Awards, the academy said screenplays must be “human-authored” to be eligible for awards consideration, and that only performances “demonstrably performed by humans with their consent” will qualify for acting prizes. The academy’s Board of Governors reviews its rules annually.This year’s revisions arrive as the industry continues to grapple with how AI tools are reshaping the creative process — and how institutions like the Oscars should reward that work, if at all. The new changes build on guidance introduced a year ago, when the academy said that the use of AI would “neither help nor harm” a film’s chances of receiving a nomination, while emphasizing that voters should consider “the degree to which a human was at the heart of the creative authorship.” At the time, the organization stopped short of requiring formal disclosure of AI use, even as the technology became a flash point across Hollywood.","score":0.86981434,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://variety.com/2026/film/awards/oscars-rule-changes-ai-acting-nominations-international-1236734659","title":"Oscars 2026 Rules: AI Limits, Multiple Acting Nominations Allowed","content":"# Oscar Rule Changes: AI Crackdown, Actors Can Get Multiple Nominations in Same Category and International Film Eligibility Expands. TOPSHOT - An Oscar statue is seen ahead of the 98th Annual Academy Awards at the Dolby Theatre in Hollywood, California, on March 14, 2026. The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences has approved a substantive slate of new and updated rules for the 99th Oscars, set for 2027, showing its evolving standards around eligibility, authorship and global inclusion. Performers may now receive multiple nominations in the same category if their performances rank among the top five vote-getters, a move that finally aligns the acting races with the rest of the ballot. The change has the potential to neutralize some of the presumed “category fraud,” at least for actors with two performances in play in the same year, in which a campaign team strategically pushes one turn into supporting to dodge a vote split.","score":0.8536326,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.ign.com/articles/academy-awards-rule-updates-tackle-ai-multiple-nominations-for-the-same-actor-and-more-ahead-of-99th-oscars","title":"Academy Awards New Rules Reveal AI and Actor Changes","content":"# Academy Awards Rule Updates Tackle AI, Multiple Nominations for the Same Actor, and More Ahead of 99th Oscars. The Academy of Motion Pictures Arts and Sciences has revealed a collection of major rule changes as it heads into the 99th Academy Awards in 2027. The Academy also noted that screenplays must be \"human-authored\" in order to be eligible in the writing categories. Elsewhere, the updated ruleset notes that actors can be nominated for multiple performances in the same category, starting with next year's 99th Academy Awards. It means that, so long as an actor gives performances that place in the top five votes, they can be nominated more than once in one category. The Hollywood Reporter notes one instance from 2009 where, had this rule been in place then, Kate Winslet, who won for The Reader that year, may have also been nominated for her appearance in Revolutionary Road.","score":0.769098,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://en.tempo.co/read/2101984/oscars-set-new-limits-on-ai-for-99th-academy-awards","title":"Oscars Set New Limits on AI for 99th Academy Awards","content":"Citing a report from People, AMPAS now formalizes the requirement that a script must be authored by a human to be deemed eligible. This move","score":0.7657514,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.bostonherald.com/2026/05/01/oscars-ai-rules","title":"Oscars expands international film eligibility, addresses AI","content":"When it comes to the eligibility of performances, only roles “demonstrably performed by humans with their consent” will be considered.","score":0.7325349,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.25,"request_id":"be4836cb-9d06-452d-8645-10301967191f"}
